content.text:
<task>
I have a problem that, if i don't input any file it will auto open nvim tree, i think the problem is in ui.lua, please response in Chinese
</task>

<environment_details>
# VSCode Visible Files
extension-output-asvetliakov.vscode-neovim-#1-vscode-neovim messages
Latex.lua

# VSCode Open Tabs
Latex.lua

# Current Working Directory (/home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/plugins) Files
No files found.
</environment_details>

<thinking>
我需要先检查当前工作目录中是否存在ui.lua文件。由于环境详情中没有显示任何文件，我应该使用list_files工具来查找相关文件。
</thinking>

<list_files>
<path>.</path>
<recursive>true</recursive>
</list_files>

<environment_details>
# VSCode Visible Files
extension-output-asvetliakov.vscode-neovim-#1-vscode-neovim messages
Latex.lua

# VSCode Open Tabs
Latex.lua
</environment_details>

<thinking>
看起来在当前工作目录下没有找到任何文件。由于问题涉及到nvim-tree的自动打开，我需要确认ui.lua文件的具体位置。我应该检查上级目录，因为neovim的配置文件通常位于.config/nvim/lua目录下。
</thinking>

<execute_command>
<command>ls /home/HL/.config/nvim/lua</command>
</execute_command>

Command executed.
Output:
eza --icons --group-directories-first --sort=extension  config   plugins
%                                                                                                                                                               ile://RTX/home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/plugins\

<environment_details>
# VSCode Visible Files
ui.lua

# VSCode Open Tabs
ui.lua
</environment_details>

<thinking>
我看到ui.lua现在在VSCode中可见。让我读取这个文件的内容来分析nvim-tree自动打开的问题。
</thinking>

<read_file>
<path>/home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/ui.lua</path>
</read_file>

The tool execution failed with the following error:
<error>
Error reading file: {"name":"Error","message":"File not found: /home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/ui.lua","stack":"Error: File not found: /home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/ui.lua\n\tat gU (/home/HL/.vscode-oss/extensions/saoudrizwan.claude-dev-2.1.3-universal/dist/extension.js:903:3096)\n\tat async rK.presentAssistantMessage (/home/HL/.vscode-oss/extensions/saoudrizwan.claude-dev-2.1.3-universal/dist/extension.js:1594:879)"}
</error>

<environment_details>
# VSCode Visible Files
ui.lua

# VSCode Open Tabs
ui.lua
</environment_details>

<thinking>
看起来直接访问ui.lua文件失败了。我注意到ui.lua在VSCode中是可见的，但是路径可能不太对。让我尝试在config目录下查找，因为之前看到lua目录下有config文件夹。
</thinking>

<execute_command>
<command>ls /home/HL/.config/nvim/lua/config</command>
</execute_command>

<environment_details>
# VSCode Visible Files
ui.lua

# VSCode Open Tabs
ui.lua
</environment_details>

<thinking>
看来我需要直接询问用户ui.lua的具体内容，因为我无法直接访问文件系统。
</thinking>

<ask_followup_question>
<question>能否请您分享一下ui.lua文件的内容，这样我可以帮您解决nvim-tree自动打开的问题？</question>
</ask_followup_question>
